svg.text: Get neighbor list AND full-precision vector in one shot!

svg.text: Key insight: We needed the neighbor list anyway (to know where to go next).

svg.text: The vector comes along for free within the same 4K page.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, cursive

svg.text: This enables implicit re-ranking without any extra I/O.

svg.text: ← node 42 in binary. Not '4','2' (2 bytes) but 0x0000002A (4 bytes).

svg.text: Saves 2+ bytes per key vs string format. At 1B entries that's 2+ GB less index size.
